title: Pagewright: ship a site in minutes
description: Pick a template, customize it visually, and publish to GitHub Pages with one click.

props.heading: Ship a beautiful site in minutes without writing code
props.subheading: Choose a template, make it yours with a visual editor, and publish straight to your own GitHub repository. Drafts, scheduling, and updates are all handled for you.

props.heading: Everything you need to go live
props.subheading: Pagewright wires up the repo, the workflows, and the deploys so you can focus on content.

items.title: Visual builder
items.body: Drag, drop, and edit blocks with a live preview in light or dark mode.

items.title: One-click publish
items.body: Provisions a repo with GitHub Actions that build and deploy to Pages automatically.

items.title: Drafts and scheduling
items.body: Mark pages as drafts and let GitHub Actions publish them on schedule.

items.title: Drag-and-drop media
items.body: Drop in images and they're committed to your repo's media folder.

items.title: GitHub auth only
items.body: Acts on your behalf with scoped, revocable permissions. Your content, your repo.

items.title: Safe self-updates
items.body: Template improvements arrive as pull requests that preserve your content.

props.heading: Your next site is one click away
props.body: Publish your first page from a repository you control.

props.tagline: No-code sites, powered by your GitHub.
